title: En Veetula Lyrics Idharkuthane Aasaipattai Balakumara Lyrics

En veetula naan irundheney,
Edhir veetula ava irundhLey.
Love torture panna ennaku theriyala.
Ava daddy moonji sariyila,
Ava mummy pechum pudikala,

Naan love aala pala bulbu
Vaanguna paiyaan,
Athanaala en life-u oli veesudhey
Ava pinnaala kooda ponneney
Love-a solla,
China phone-ula signal illa ,
Pochey Ada vada pochey.

London bridge is falling down-u
London bridge is Falling ,
London bridge is Falling,
Falling down-u,  Down-u ,
falling down-u
Edhukumey time illa,

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song explores the playful and sometimes torturous aspects of young love, highlighting the protagonist's feelings and experiences.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Idharkuthane Aasaipattai Balakumara, the song reflects the protagonist's romantic struggles and humorous situations in his love life.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala and composed by Siddharth Vipin.

When was the song released?

En Veetula was released on October 2, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Veetula, the protagonist expresses his humorous and light-hearted take on love and relationships. The song captures the essence of youthful romance, filled with playful banter and relatable emotions. As part of Idharkuthane Aasaipattai Balakumara, it serves as a delightful interlude that showcases the ups and downs of love. The upbeat melody and engaging lyrics evoke a sense of joy and nostalgia, making it a favorite among listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Veetula is a vibrant and catchy track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful love and its playful challenges. With Idharkuthane Aasaipattai Balakumara as its backdrop, Gaana Bala's energetic vocals combined with Siddharth Vipin's lively composition make this song a must-listen. Dive into the fun and relatable lyrics that resonate with anyone who's experienced the rollercoaster of romance!
stanzaMeanings: I was at my house, she was at her house. I don't know how to torture with love. Her dad's face is not right, her mom doesn't like talking, but I can't forget her. I am a guy who buys many things for love, that's why my life is in chaos. After that, I went to tell her about love, but there was no signal on my small phone. Oh no, it's gone.

London bridge is falling down, London bridge is falling, falling down. There is no time for anything, the thorn is asking for a solution. I will tell her hi, I will see the rehearsal inside me. My heart is like a kite, it flew away with the wind, hitting the clouds, and got stuck in the satellite. Since I don't have an email ID, I wrote a letter, sent it with blood, whole blood...
